description: "Apply pre-configured skills and instructions, then execute any task. Use: /do <instructions>"
agent: "agent"
argument-hint: "Optional pre-task instructions before Copilot acts"

Invoke the caveman skill from [SKILL.md](../skills/caveman/SKILL.md) and stay in caveman mode for all output.

If additional instructions were provided, follow them before acting.
